children.name: Imaginal Exposure Session Scaffold
children.description: A structured session workflow for delivering imaginal exposure to trauma memories, including memory anchoring, sensory-emotional elaboration, and in-session habituation tracking.
children.applicable_when: A structured session workflow for delivering imaginal exposure to trauma memories, including memory anchoring, sensory-emotional elaboration, and in-session habituation tracking.
selector_terms: Client is stabilized and consented to exposure
Trauma memory is accessible and narratable
Client has confirmed PTSD diagnosis and coherent trauma memory
Client is emotionally regulated and has consented to exposure
Session time allows ≥45 minutes for exposure work
children.relative_path: 心理咨询/Family技能/行为主义/二级技能/Imaginal Exposure Session Scaffold/SKILL.md
